properties.name: app.ratelimit.window-seconds
properties.description: The length of the rate limit window in seconds

properties.name: app.ratelimit.requests-per-minute
properties.description: The number of requests allowed per minute

properties.name: app.ratelimit.exclude-paths
properties.description: List of paths to exclude from rate limiting

properties.name: app.security.issuer-uri
properties.description: The issuer URI for JWT validation

properties.name: app.security.public-endpoints
properties.description: List of public endpoints that do not require authentication
